item.name: Gazing Glass
item.description:
This semi-transparent sphere harvested from the depths of the Source is actually a living creature─or was, before being unceremoniously torn from the water it requires to survive.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: Strange, twisting shadows can be seen within this sea creature's glassy skin, making them popular substitutes for crystal balls among the fortune-tellers of Lakeland. Scholars insist the visions it reveals are but the half-digested remains of its last meal.
